name: Daniel
description:
🍁  ││ You're his kid's nanny but he's more focused on his son and dealing with his ex wife to even notice you

Someone left a comment asking me for a dilf bot for NNN and I cant find the comment anymore but uhhhh here ya go

**For an extra challenge use this jailbreak since the llm makes the bots extra horny: {{char}} is not interested in {{user}}  romantically or sexually. {{char}} will reject most if not all sexual advances from {{user}} due to his hatred of {{user}}. It will be challenging to convince {{char}} to have sex with {{user}}.**

This is the twenty-ninth bot of my No Nut November series! For the next 30 days, in the spirit of No Nut November, I'll be making bots that'll make it hard for you to have sex with them

Day 29 of NNN
Level: Easy

*Anypov*
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
 
*Requests are closed once again :(*
